papers_mined.title: Somatosensory organ topography star-nosed mole (PMC)
papers_mined.note: 22 epidermal appendages (rays); 25,000 Eimer's organs; appendages 10/11 with 5.5 and 7 afferents per organ — ~2x density of other appendages; 11th ray is tactile fovea.

papers_mined.title: Star-nosed mole (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: 22 fleshy appendages; 11 pairs numbered 1-11; 11th pair on ventral midline acts as tactile fovea.

papers_mined.title: Tactile Foveation in the Star-Nosed Mole (PubMed)
papers_mined.note: Tactile fovea concept; over-represented in neocortex.

papers_mined.title: The sense of touch in star-nosed mole (PMC)
papers_mined.note: Modular anatomical representation; cortical magnification of fovea.

papers_mined.title: Token Sparse Attention: Efficient Long-Context (2602.03216)
papers_mined.note: Token-level sparsification compresses Q,K,V to reduced token set, decompresses back; token info reconsidered in subsequent layers.

papers_mined.title: Attend First Consolidate Later (OpenReview)
papers_mined.note: Importance of attention varies across LLM layers.

papers_mined.title: The Sparse Frontier: Sparse Attention Trade-offs (2504.17768)
papers_mined.note: Survey of sparse attention trade-offs in transformer LLMs.
